notes: All features were computed on the PCNA-focused crawl (72 PDB structures). ESM-2 embeddings are the primary per-residue feature. No AlphaFold confidence scores or traditional B-factor arrays are stored separately; B-factors are embedded in raw PDB ATOM records.

features.name: esm2_residue_embeddings
features.description: Per-residue ESM-2 (esm2_t30_150M_UR50D or similar) language model embeddings, one vector per CA residue in the processed structure
features.notes: 146 .npy files exist vs 72 catalog records; extra IDs may come from extended CryptoSite set also processed in this pipeline

features.name: graph_edge_index_and_node_features
features.description: PyTorch Geometric Data objects containing node features (likely ESM embeddings or one-hot AA + positional), edge indices from distance threshold, and residue-level pocket labels where available
features.notes: 88 graph .pt files; some may be from CryptoSite extended set

features.name: pocket_heuristic_scores
features.description: Per-structure heuristic cryptic pocket scoring from GNN inference pass: mean_score, std_score, max_score, pct_above_0.4, pct_above_0.5, n_pockets, top_chain, top_resid
features.notes: 90 score rows; covers 72 catalog structures plus CryptoSite extras
